text: Hello? Hi, this is Nancy with U.S. medical supplies. Hope I caught you at a good time. I'm calling about the continuous glucose monitor. It lets you track your blood sugar without pricking your finger. Do you have diabetes? No, not that I know of. No, so I'm assuming that, which you're sorry, I didn't touch that. Just a simple yes or no. Do you currently have diabetes? No. That's good. Take care now.
